description: Optiversal provides AI-powered catalog enrichment, landing pages, and retail content tools for ecommerce merchants. Its platform helps merchants publish and retrieve generated product, page, and enrichment data across customer-hosted Optiversal deployments.
summary: Optiversal exposes two public MCP servers plus documented HTTP APIs: a tenant-hosted Optiversal Site API and an Enrichment Retrieval API that uses an Optiversal-issued API key via `x-api-key`.
